notes: Power-off UX fixes. Slide-to-confirm replaced with a big red tap-on-icon — slide hit-tests were dropping when the swipe didn't quite reach the right edge, making shutdown feel unreliable. Tap is deterministic. BOOT button hold threshold lowered 3 s -> 2.5 s so the perceived 'press 3 seconds' lands inside the window without debounce/render-latency padding. Holding the button now also forces the screen awake during the press, so the bottom progress bar is visible even when starting from a fully-blanked IDLE.
